emails.subject: Re: Ideas on Blue/Green Files
emails.body: Re: Ideas on Blue/Green Files Things have come up w/Mark Sara and there is a clear indication from their front that we need to retain the green files. Maybe we need to discuss this with the whole group...? Mary Cook 04/23/2001 09:50 AM

emails.subject: Re: Ideas on Blue/Green Files
emails.body: OK. At this week's meeting I will remind everyone that they need to be kept updated. Cordially, Mary Cook Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith, 38th Floor, Legal Houston, Texas 77002-7361 (713) 345-7732 (phone) (713) 646-3490 (fax) mary.cook@enron.com Tana Jones 04/23/2001 10:03 AM
